title: eriocaulon truncatum var. truncatum
intro: Eriocaulon truncatum var. truncatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, commonly known as the 'Truncatum Pygmy Pipewort'. It is native to India and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from skin conditions. Eriocaulon truncatum var. truncatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, or used in tincture form to leverage its medicinal properties.
